settings.title: Welcome to the AEC PM Connect New Jersey 2026 Cloud

settings.editor:
A heartfelt thank you to all our incredible attendees and sponsors of the 2026 AEC PM Connect.

We deeply appreciate your continued support and participation, and we hope your
time in New Jersey was both enjoyable and enriching.

All session materials and handouts are stored here for your continued learning and application.

settings.title: AEC PM Connect New Jersey 2026 Workbook

settings.editor:
The official event workbook is your companion guide to applying what you learned during the 2026 New Jersey PM Connect Event. 

Inside, you’ll find:

  • Key takeaways and summaries from each session

  • Step-by-step exercises to reinforce learning

  • Worksheets and checklists for project application

  • Space for reflection and action planning
